title: Opening for Production Engineer at Charak Pharma

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Charak Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!
